contents: Marie Curie was a Polish-born physicist and chemist known for her pioneering research on radioactivity.

qas.question: What is the role of an AI assistant?
qas.answer: Generating questions and answers from text.

qas.question: What are the specialties of the AI assistant?
qas.answer: The AI assistant specializes in generating questions and answers from text.
